example_queries: lots of people|lots of the people|plenty of people|plenty of the people|the rest of people|the rest of the people

expected_pattern: reproduce subgroup contrast between bare/non-partitive and definite partitive complements

query_family: finite agreement after partitive/QN people frames
example_queries: lots of people are|lots of people is|plenty of people are|plenty of people is|the rest of the people are|the rest of the people is
opportunity_denominator: subject-position partitive or QN people-frame opportunities with finite present agreement
expected_pattern: plural agreement should dominate for plural-people complements after KWIC filtering
filtering_focus: non-subject uses; relative-clause parse shifts; object-position phrases; metalinguistic examples

expected_pattern: plural agreement should dominate if member construal supplies controller

example_queries: a bunch of flowers is|a bunch of flowers are|a bunch of flowers was|a bunch of flowers were|a bunch of things is|a bunch of things are|a bunch of things was|a bunch of things were
